title: asplenium marinum var. depauperatum
intro: Asplenium marinum var. depauperatum, also known as the lesser water fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The lesser water fern is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting potential antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared by infusing its leaves in water or making a decoction to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully validate its efficacy and safety.
